rule_metadata.name: config_php
rule_metadata.description: Find config.php files that have details for the db
rule_metadata.author: Brian Carter

rules.rule_text:
rule config_php
{
	meta:
		description = "Find config.php files that have details for the db"
		author = "Brian Carter"
		last_modified = "March 31, 2017"

	strings:
		$txt1 = "$mysql_host ="
		$txt2 = "$mysql_user ="
		$txt3 = "mysql_pass ="
		$txt4 = "mysql_database ="
		$txt5 = "global_filter_list"
		$txt6 = "white-list"
		$php1 = "<?php"

	condition:
		$php1 at 0 and all of ( $txt* )
}
